mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS image_files ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, file_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, creation_date DATETIME, modification_date DATETIME, last_access_time DATETIME, file_format VARCHAR(20), file_size BIGINT, file_md5 VARCHAR(32), file_path VARCHAR(512) UNIQUE, width INT, height INT, folder_name VARCHAR(255), actor VARCHAR(255), score VARCHAR(10), create_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
